summary: Iteration 108: Tested Bank Account Management and Branch Dues Detail features. All 13 backend tests passed. All 10 frontend UI tests passed. Bank Accounts CRUD fully functional. Bank Account selector appears in Sales form when bank payment mode selected. Dashboard 'View Details' button opens dues detail dialog showing cross-branch transactions.
seed_data_creation: Existing test bank account: Al Rajhi - Main (account_number: 1234567890, is_default: true). Test CRUD created/deleted TEST_Bank_Account_* during tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bank Accounts page accessible from sidebar under Reports section at /bank-accounts. Bank account selector in Sales form (data-testid='sale-bank-account-select') only appears when: 1) bank payment mode is selected AND 2) bank accounts exist in the system AND 3) bank amount > 0. Dashboard dues detail dialog (data-testid='dues-detail-dialog') shows cross-branch transactions with columns: Date, Type, From Branch, To Branch, Amount, Description.

1_bank_accounts_page_loads.details: Bank Accounts page (/bank-accounts) loads from sidebar under Reports section. Shows existing 'Al Rajhi - Main' account card with account number, branch, and default badge.

2_add_bank_account_dialog.details: Add Bank Account dialog opens with fields: Display Name (data-testid='bank-name-input'), Bank Name (data-testid='bank-bank-name-input'), Account Number (data-testid='bank-account-number-input'), IBAN (data-testid='bank-iban-input'), Branch selector, Default checkbox.

3_backend_get_bank_accounts.details: GET /api/bank-accounts returns list of bank accounts with all fields (id, name, bank_name, account_number, iban, branch_id, is_default, notes, created_at).

4_backend_create_bank_account.details: POST /api/bank-accounts creates new bank account. Returns 200 with created account data including generated id.

5_backend_update_bank_account.details: PUT /api/bank-accounts/{id} updates existing bank account. Verified update persists via subsequent GET.

6_backend_delete_bank_account.details: DELETE /api/bank-accounts/{id} deletes bank account. Returns 200 with success message. Verified deletion via subsequent GET.

8_sales_bank_account_selector.details: Sales form shows 'Select Bank Account' dropdown (data-testid='sale-bank-account-select') when bank payment mode is selected and bank amount > 0. Dropdown shows available bank accounts.

9_dashboard_view_dues_detail_button.details: Dashboard 'Branch-to-Branch Dues' section has 'View Details' button (data-testid='view-dues-detail-btn').

10_dues_detail_dialog.details: Clicking 'View Details' opens dues detail dialog (data-testid='dues-detail-dialog') with table showing columns: Date, Type, From Branch, To Branch, Amount, Description. Shows 2 cross-branch transactions (Transfer and Supplier Payment).

11_backend_branch_dues_detail.details: GET /api/reports/branch-dues-detail returns {entries: [...], total: N} with cross-branch transactions sorted by date descending.

12_backend_branch_dues_net.details: GET /api/reports/branch-dues-net returns branch dues summary used by dashboard.

13_sidebar_bank_accounts_link.details: Bank Accounts link (data-testid='nav-bank-accounts') present in sidebar under Reports section for admin users.
